bead.title: availability: recent usage on drilldown via extended agentSessions filters; expose AgentSession.provider + WorkerExecutionResult.Tier
bead.description: Recent usage panel on per-provider drilldown. Extend agentSessions filter to support provider scope. Expose AgentSession.provider and WorkerExecutionResult.Tier in GraphQL schema. Forward-only — no historical backfill.
bead.acceptance: 1. agentSessions resolver supports provider filter. 2. AgentSession.provider field exposed. 3. WorkerExecutionResult.Tier exposed. 4. Drilldown shows recent usage rows.
